pom.xml.general_idea: Add project metadata such as name, description, organization, and developers to improve project documentation.
Add SCM configuration to link the project to its Git repository for version control integration.
Configure distribution management for deploying snapshots and releases to OSSRH.
Add license information to the POM to comply with open-source distribution requirements.
Add a Maven profile for GPG signing of artifacts during release builds.
Add Maven Source Plugin to attach source jars during the build process.
Add Maven Javadoc Plugin to generate and attach Javadoc jars during the build process.
Add License Maven Plugin to check and format license headers in source files.
Add Versions Maven Plugin to facilitate dependency version management.
Add Gitflow Maven Plugin to support Gitflow branching strategies.
Add Maven Release Plugin to automate the release process.
Configure resource filtering to allow property substitution in filtered resources.
Set the Camunda External Task Client dependency scope to 'provided' to avoid bundling it in the final artifact.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven target directory to gitignore to exclude build artifacts.
Add .local directory to gitignore to exclude local configuration or data.
Add IntelliJ IDEA specific files and directories to gitignore.

README.md.general_idea: Replace minimal README with comprehensive documentation including features, usage examples, and version compatibility matrix.
README.md.human_impl: diff --git a/README.md b/README.md ... +## ℹ️ Description ... +## ⭐ Features ... +## 🚀 How to use
